name: coSetOutputLevel
title: coSetOutputLevel
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
void coSetOutputLevel( dword level, dword errCode[] );
The function sets the output level of the node layer. Note It must be noted that this function may only be called if the node has been started.
Note It must be noted that this function may only be called if the node has been started.
Note It must be noted that this function may only be called if the node has been started.
errCode Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field)
